ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "death_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death rate record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county associated with the death rate */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Age-adjusted death rate per 100,000 population */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* 95% confidence interval for the death rate */,
  "average_annual_count" INTEGER /* Average annual count of deaths */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Recent trend in death rates (e.g., rising, falling) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the death rate is reported */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 0-14, 15-64, 65+) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the population (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race and ethnicity of the population */,
  "source" TEXT /* Data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_death_rates_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_objectives" (
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health objective */,
  "objective_description" TEXT /* Description of the health objective */,
  "is_met" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the objective has been met */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the health objective */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the health objective */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the health objective */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the health objective (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("objective_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_health_objectives" (
  "county_objective_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county-objective association */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health objective */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the health objective in the county (e.g., In Progress, Completed, Not Started) */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress percentage towards meeting the health objective */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_objective_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_health_objectives_objective_id FOREIGN KEY ("objective_id") REFERENCES health_objectives ("objective_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_health_objectives_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county associated with the trend */,
  "recent_trend" TEXT /* Recent trend in death rates */,
  "five_year_trend" TEXT /* 5-year trend in death rates */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the trend is reported */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 0-14, 15-64, 65+) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the population (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race and ethnicity of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
